function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-02. Birthday search across cast showed the nearest upcoming month-day is 04-04, and direct read of 10_entities/cast/petra.md confirms the exact canonical name 'Petra Novak' with birthday 1988-04-04. A targeted search for '04-04' in /10_entities/cast found only petra.md, so no tie exists.
